## NYT::NFlow::TMoniumMetricParameters {#NYT_NFlow_TMoniumMetricParameters}
<!-- This file is generated by yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/generate.sh script -->
<!-- Before using doc generation tool check readme: yt/yt/flow/tools/generate_yson_struct_doc/README.md -->
Source: [yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/monium/cpp/spec.h]({{source-root}}/yt/yt/flow/yandex/extensions/monium/cpp/spec.h)

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `metric_type` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Metric type: `DGAUGE`, `IGAUGE`, `COUNTER`, or `RATE`. Determines which field of `Metric` (`double_value` or `int_value`) the value is written to and what type checks the sink performs when parsing the column. ||
|| `metric_value_column` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Required parameter**
Column name in the input row whose value is written to `Metric`. The same name is placed in the label with the key `metric_name_label` (see below) and is used as the sensor name in Monium. ||
|| `labels` | **Type**: `std::vector<std::string>`
**Default value**: `[]`
List of column names whose values are added as sensor labels. Default is empty. ||
|#
